Mtn To Confirm Finra Arb Award
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS UBS FINANCIAL SERVICE, INC., GEORGE SELLERS, JAMES BRANDT AND ROBERT SCHNEIDER'S Motion To Confirm Finra Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
